LCC-HS10-L3-BR300-HSELA910-CSR-LAT-01 • HS English 9–10 • Theme and Its Development (Literary Text)

The Panel That Carries It

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the girl mainly explaining to the boy?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the boy think the girl should add a panel earlier in the comic?
3QUESTION 3: Based on the conversation, what does the girl realize about her storyboard?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
